prep_checklist.title: Complete the Ch14 preparation checklist — Dragon Breath ×64, Shulker Boxes ×8, Chorus farm running, Elytra + Fireworks stocked

subtitle.text: Ch14 opens the full void economy. Come prepared. The End does not give second chances to underprepared players.

description: CH.13 · READY FOR CH14
▸ Ch14 (What the Void Remembers) is about deep-End economy.
It opens End's Delight, Dragon Egg Research,
advanced Endergetic crafting, and void-dimension builds.
All of it assumes you have a running supply chain from Ch13.
Do not enter Ch14 cold.
◈ REQUIRED BEFORE CH14
└ ✦ Dragon Breath: 64+ bottles
(End's Delight + Lingering Potion brewing)
└ ✦ Shulker Boxes: 8+ crafted
(inventory management for deep End expeditions)
└ ✦ Chorus Plant farm: actively producing
(Popped Chorus, Quantum Fluid, End's Delight ingredients)
└ ✦ Elytra: equipped + spare if possible
└ ✦ Firework Rockets: 2-3 full stacks
(outer island traversal — 1000+ block flights common)
└ ✦ Dragon Egg: collected (DO NOT smelt — research item)
└ ✦ Recovery Compass: crafted (8 Echo Shards + Compass)
◈ STRONGLY RECOMMENDED
└ Enderman farm: running passively for pearl income
└ ISS Eldritch loadout: assembled for void combat
└ Booflo Vest: crafted for End City vertical mobility
└ Cataclysm End bosses: cleared (Harbinger + Primordial)
(they drop Cataclysm materials needed in Ch14 crafting)
└ At least 1 Shulker Box kit per build project prepared
(pre-pack gear sets for each major Ch14 activity)
◈ LOGISTICS SETUP
└ Ender Chest: place one at your main End base
(links to home Ender Chest — retrieve supplies from Overworld)
└ Bed: cannot sleep in End — use respawn anchor or return
home between sessions
└ Create Teleporter network (if built in Ch10):
Set a teleporter destination in the End for fast return
(Quantum Fluid fuel: your Chorus farm is the supply)
▸ Ch14 is the end of the End.
After Ch14, the void is mapped.
After Ch14, the void is yours.
But the void only gives that to people who arrived ready.
Everyone else it just keeps.
Check the list. Then go.
▶ Complete the Ch14 preparation checklist [check]
▶ Craft 8 Shulker Boxes
◇ Ch14 quest tab: What the Void Remembers.
It opens when ch13_outer is complete.
The Dragon Egg Research mechanic is Ch14's central system.
Your dragon egg, dragon breath, and chorus supply
are the three pillars it runs on.
Do not skip the farm builds.
